title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSNL family as a Software Engineer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSNL:
BSNL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL!
